cot_prefix: Okay, let's read the given text and determine the correct answer. The text says: "The film 'Wedding Feast' proved to be a hit. It won the German Golden Bear Award and entered the competition for one of the Oscar Academy Awards. Also, it was the first Taiwan film that was permitted to be shown in the U. S. Thanks to the film, Zhao Wenxuan became popular in Taiwan, Hong Kong and southeast Asia." This part clearly states that the film "Wedding Feast" was a success and that it contributed to Zhao Wenxuan's popularity. So, this supports option (C) "Zhao Wenxuan became a famous movie star because of the film 'Wedding Feast'."
